title: themeda thwaitesii
intro: Themeda thwaitesii, also known as the elephant grass, is a species of grass found in Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Themeda thwaitesii include its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and infections. Themeda thwaitesii is often prepared into herbal tea, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
